name: data-aware intake: every data question cites a source that exists in the S-37 catalogs
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-intake.sh" --with-data --list-questions 2>/dev/null > q.json
ruby -ryaml -rjson -e 'Encoding.default_external=Encoding::UTF_8; r=ENV["CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"]; ids={}; [r+"/standards/data-architecture-sources.yaml", r+"/standards/distributed-systems-sources.yaml"].each{|fp| YAML.unsafe_load_file(fp).each{|e| ids[e["id"]]=true}}; qs=JSON.parse(File.read("q.json")); dataq=qs.select{|x| %w[data_volume read_write_pattern consistency_need communication_style integration_scope data_cadence].include?(x["key"])}; exit(dataq.all?{|x| ids[x["source_id"]]} ? 0 : 1)' && echo all-grounded 1>&2
